title: Create: Train Announcer
description: A joke addon for Create that adds a funny train announcer block.
body:
# **Create: Train Announcer**
_A New Dimension of Rail-Based Immersion_

**Create: Train Announcer** is a meticulously engineered content expansion for the acclaimed Create mod, introducing an advanced signaling system to the railway infrastructure within Minecraft. Designed to seamlessly integrate into existing Create-powered worlds, this addon offers a subtle yet profound enhancement to the auditory realism of player-built transportation networks.

At its core lies the **Train Announcer**, an elegantly modeled, fully functional block that operates via traditional redstone control. With precision-crafted soundscapes and a commitment to immersive worldbuilding, this block empowers engineers to replicate the nuanced dynamics of real-world train station ambience.

## 🛠️ **_Functionality Overview_**
Upon receiving a redstone signal, the Train Announcer initiates a standardized three-phase auditory sequence:
1. **Pre-Announcement Chime** — A brief, tonally calibrated xylophone melody is played. This serves to draw attention to the impending announcement and offers a moment of auditory separation from environmental sounds and other mechanical activity.
2. **Automated Rail Transit Notification** — The announcement system then emits a voice broadcast, modeled after contemporary station audio systems. Leveraging advanced distortion algorithms, the speech has been processed through multiple layers of fidelity degradation, ensuring it matches the acoustic properties of long-range public address systems. This fidelity degradation simulates microphone occlusion, analog tape hiss, and spatial echo, achieving a level of realism previously unattainable in Minecraft-based audio architecture.
3. **Post-Announcement Chime** — Following a calculated pause, an outro melody—tonally consistent with the initial chime—signals the conclusion of the broadcast cycle.

The block is single-purpose by design, allowing for targeted applications in both player-facing and NPC-automated railway hubs. Whether deployed within bustling station halls or alongside wilderness outposts, the Train Announcer enhances both form and function.

## 🔧 **_Technical Integration_**
- **Redstone Compatibility:** The block responds to all standard redstone inputs, including levers, buttons, pressure plates, observers, and scheduled redstone pulses via repeaters or mechanical timers.
- **Rotation Independent:** Placement orientation does not impact functionality, allowing for modular integration into any station architecture.
- **Client-Side Optimization:** Audio files are streamed in an efficient format, reducing performance overhead during extended use or when deployed in multiplayer environments.
- **Creative Tab Inclusion:** The block is available within its own categorized tab under the "create_train_announcer:train_announcer" namespace, for enhanced visibility in creative mode workflows.

## 🎨 **_Design Philosophy_**
A guiding principle in the development of this mod was the **suspension of disbelief**. While many Create expansions focus on mechanical complexity or kinetic interactivity, this addon leans into **ambient storytelling**, encouraging builders to think not just in motion, but in **atmosphere**.

Every aspect of the **Train Announcer** has been designed to align visually, mechanically, and thematically with the core ethos of the Create mod. The model and textures adhere to Create’s visual language, while the audio assets have undergone rigorous post-processing to ensure a high degree of spatial believability.

## 🔍 **_Use Case Scenarios_**
- Enhancing roleplay on server-based transit systems
- Adding auditory feedback for station arrivals and departures
- Increasing realism in industrial-themed builds
- Synchronizing with mechanical contraptions for cinematic or storytelling purposes
- Amplifying player immersion through passive environmental audio

## 📈 **_Future Development_**
While currently focused on a singular auditory block, the **Create: Train Announcer** addon was designed with modularity in mind. Future updates may include (but are not promised):
- Customizable announcement content (configurable via resource pack or datapack integration)
- Chime selection system with pitch and instrument variants
- Directional sound emission for more accurate sound propagation
- Timed announcement scheduling via integration with Create’s sequencing system

## 📦 **_Dependencies_**
- **Minecraft**: 1.20.1
- **Create**
- **Forge**

***

**Create: Train Announcer** is not merely a block. It is an **experience** — a testament to the idea that even the smallest detail, when executed with precision and care, can profoundly transform the way we build and play.
